positive: Minimalist graphic illustration of a majestic golden retriever wearing a stylized crown, standing triumphantly on a smooth, glowing crescent moon. The background is a deep indigo gradient transitioning to midnight blue. Style should be modern, clean vector art mixed with watercolor ethereal washes, achieving a strong silhouette contrast. Key elements are clean lines, geometric simplicity, and soft glow effects. Focus on a central, vertically oriented composition suitable for apparel prints. Limited color palette of gold, indigo, cream, and deep blue. High contrast, excellent detail, perfect symmetry, graphic novel aesthetic.
